Vintage Retail Lab (Hobby)

Vintage Retail Lab is a hobby retail venture that I run alongside my research work. I use it as a real world testbed for customer experience, marketing, and lightweight AI tools. It forces fast feedback loops, clear business metrics, and operational constraints.

What I do

Customer and demand understanding
Identify customer segments, product preferences, and drivers of repeat purchases across marketplaces and communities.
Impact: Translates user behaviour into practical decisions on sourcing, messaging, and product selection.
Pricing and unit economics
Track margins, inventory turnover, and acquisition costs to guide sourcing and pricing decisions.
Impact: Connects operational choices to measurable outcomes and sustainability of the workflow.
Growth and promotion experiments
Run small experiments on listings, messaging, and channels using measurable conversion signals.
Impact: Builds an experimentation mindset with clear hypotheses and lightweight measurement.
AI assisted operations
Build small tools that speed up listing creation, content adaptation, and inventory organisation.
Impact: Demonstrates practical automation under constraints, focusing on usability and time saved.

Tooling projects I have tested or want to test

Listing and description assistant
Generate product descriptions with tone control and basic compliance checks.
Status: Planned / Iterating
Semantic inventory search and tagging
Improve discovery and organisation with semantic search and structured tags.
Status: Planned
Bundle and cross sell suggestions
Simple recommendation rules to propose bundles and complementary items.
Status: Planned
Demand signals and restocking priorities
Lightweight forecasting to prioritise sourcing and restocking based on observed demand.
Status: Planned

Why it matters professionally

This hobby project strengthens my ability to translate AI methods into product language, including funnel metrics, customer value, and iteration speed. It also keeps me close to how users react to system behaviour in real conditions.
